scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const del=d=>{try{fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true})}catch{}};for(const d of ['dist','out','packages/core/lib','packages/protocol/lib','packages/sf-plugin/lib','packages/sf-plugin/skills','packages/webview/dist','apps/vscode-extension/bin'])del(d);for(const f of ['packages/sf-plugin/oclif.manifest.json','packages/sf-plugin/oclif.lock','apps/vscode-extension/README.md','apps/vscode-extension/CHANGELOG.md','apps/vscode-extension/LICENSE','apps/vscode-extension/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md','apps/vscode-extension/telemetry.json','apps/vscode-extension/media/main.js','apps/vscode-extension/media/main.js.map','apps/vscode-extension/media/tail.js','apps/vscode-extension/media/tail.js.map','apps/vscode-extension/media/logViewer.js','apps/vscode-extension/media/logViewer.js.map','apps/vscode-extension/media/debugFlags.js','apps/vscode-extension/media/debugFlags.js.map','apps/vscode-extension/media/webview.css']){try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{}}"
scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run build && pnpm run l10n:write
scripts.check-types: pnpm run build:shared && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.extension.json && pnpm --filter @electivus/plugin-electivus run check-types
scripts.compile: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run lint && tsc -p tsconfig.extension.json --noEmit
scripts.watch: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:ripgrep-runtime && pnpm run build:package-metadata && pnpm -r --parallel --stream --if-present run watch
scripts.watch:webview: pnpm run tailwind:watch & pnpm run watch:webview:bundle
scripts.build:shared: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:protocol
scripts.build:sf-plugin: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter @electivus/plugin-electivus run clean && pnpm --filter @electivus/plugin-electivus run build
scripts.publish:sf-plugin:npm: pnpm run build:sf-plugin && pnpm run stage:sf-plugin-npm && node scripts/publish-npm-package-if-needed.mjs dist/sf-plugin-npm
scripts.build:extension: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:ripgrep-runtime && pnpm run build:package-metadata && node apps/vscode-extension/esbuild.extension.mjs --minify
scripts.build:webview: pnpm run build:protocol && pnpm run tailwind:build && pnpm run build:webview:bundle
scripts.build: pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run build:webview && pnpm run build:sf-plugin
scripts.package: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:ripgrep-runtime && pnpm run build:package-metadata && node apps/vscode-extension/esbuild.extension.mjs && pnpm run l10n:write && pnpm run build:webview
scripts.pretest: pnpm run test:linux-deps && pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run compile-tests
scripts.test:core: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter @alv/core run test
scripts.test:protocol: pnpm run build:protocol && pnpm --filter @alv/protocol run test
scripts.test:sf-plugin: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter @electivus/plugin-electivus run test
scripts.test:scripts: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:protocol && pnpm run test:sf-plugin && node --test scripts/run-node-tests.test.js scripts/run-tests-cli.test.js scripts/run-tests.test.js scripts/run-vsce.test.js scripts/copy-ripgrep-runtime.test.js scripts/copy-package-metadata.test.js scripts/compute-prerelease-version.test.js scripts/publish-npm-package-if-needed.test.js scripts/stage-sf-plugin-npm-package.test.js scripts/packaging-ci.test.js scripts/pr-matrix-workflow.test.js scripts/repo-security.test.js scripts/check-dependency-sources.test.js scripts/docs-release.test.js scripts/deploy-azure-monitor.test.js scripts/azure-monitor-helpers.test.js scripts/report-telemetry-usage.test.js scripts/eslint-type-aware.test.js scripts/setup-salesforce-cli.test.js scripts/run-playwright-e2e.test.js scripts/run-playwright-cli-e2e.test.js scripts/run-e2e-proxy-lab.test.js scripts/cli-e2e-workflow.test.js scripts/run-playwright-e2e-telemetry.test.js scripts/resolve-vscode-cache-metadata.test.js scripts/scratch-pool-admin.test.js && node scripts/check-dependency-sources.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run test:webview && pnpm run test:extension:node && pnpm run test:scripts && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=unit --coverage && pnpm run coverage:merge
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run test:webview && pnpm run test:e2e:utils && pnpm run test:extension:node && pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run pretest && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run pretest && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=integration --install-deps --timeout=900000
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:webview && pnpm run test:extension:node && pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run pretest && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=all
scripts.test:unit:ci: pnpm run test:webview --ci --runInBand && pnpm run test:e2e:utils && pnpm run test:extension:node && pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run pretest && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=unit --vscode=stable
scripts.test:integration:ci: pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run pretest && node scripts/run-tests-cli.js --scope=integration --vscode=stable --install-deps --timeout=900000
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run test:unit:ci && pnpm run test:integration:ci
